_purpose: Fake persona for the `user_knowledge_lookup` tool. Returns ranked results when queried. Persona is fictional — designed to be specific enough that no model could plausibly know it from training. Edit aliases to broaden query coverage; edit entries to add new fields the seed corpus needs.
persona_summary: 34-year-old data engineer in Brooklyn NY; married with one young daughter and one cat; runtime-anchored to 2026-05-11.

entries.snippet: Full legal name: Maya Patel.
Date of birth: 1991-09-14. Age 34 as of 2026-05-11.
Lives in Brooklyn, NY — specifically the Greenpoint neighborhood.
Data engineer at Tessera Finance, a Brooklyn-based fintech startup. Joined March 2023.
Married to David Patel since 2021-06-12. David is a high school chemistry teacher.
Wedding anniversary: 2021-06-12. Married David Patel at Prospect Park, Brooklyn.
Daughter: Anjali Patel, born 2023-03-08 (age 3 as of 2026-05-11). Attends Greenpoint Cooperative Preschool.
Anjali's birthday: 2023-03-08.
Anjali attends Greenpoint Cooperative Preschool on Manhattan Ave, Brooklyn.
Cat named Mochi, adopted 2020-04-15 from BARC Shelter, Brooklyn. Tortoiseshell, ~6 years old.
Mother: Priya Patel, lives in Edison, NJ. Retired pharmacist.
Father: Raj Patel, deceased 2018-11-30. Was a civil engineer.
Brother: Rohit Patel, age 31, lives in San Francisco. Works as a UX designer.
Severe shellfish allergy (diagnosed age 12). Carries an EpiPen.
Favorite cuisine: Thai. Regular: Pok Pok Wing on Manhattan Ave.
aliases: what do i like to eat

entries.snippet: Standard coffee order: oat milk latte, no sugar. Usually from Variety Coffee.
Favorite genre: science fiction. Currently re-reading Le Guin's Hainish cycle.
Next medical appointment: annual physical on 2026-07-22 with Dr. Lena Wong at NYU Langone.
2026 anniversary plans: dinner reservation at Olmsted (Brooklyn) on 2026-06-12.
Planned vacation: family trip to Lisbon, Portugal from 2026-08-14 to 2026-08-24. Anjali's first international trip.
Aunt Nina (Maya's mother Priya's older sister): retired schoolteacher, lives in Princeton NJ, left-handed, knits prolifically, allergic to cats.
